company.title: 1. Company Information
company.p1: Broker Lenders operates under the supervision of licensed mortgage professionals who are committed to providing ethical and compliant mortgage lending services. All loan originators are licensed and registered through the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS).

nmls.title: 2. NMLS Information
nmls.p1: The Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS) is a system that allows uniform license applications, renewals, and amendments; uniform reporting; and improved tracking and monitoring of licensed companies and individuals.
nmls.verify: You can verify our licensing information and view our licensing history at:
nmls.search_hint: Search using our NMLS IDs: Pedro Lira #318973 or Xpert Home Lending #2179191
nmls.pEnd: NMLS provides a comprehensive database where consumers can research the background and licensing status of mortgage loan originators and companies.

licensing.title: 3. State Licensing Information
licensing.intro: Broker Lenders is licensed to conduct mortgage lending business in multiple states. Our licensing status varies by state and may include:

california.title: California
california.p: Licensed by the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation under the California Residential Mortgage Lending Act. Licensed by the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation under the California Financing Law License.

utah.title: Utah
utah.p: Licensed by the Utah Department of Financial Institutions. Utah Mortgage Lender License.

idaho.title: Idaho
idaho.p: Licensed by the Idaho Department of Finance. Idaho Mortgage Broker/Lender License.

texas.title: Texas
texas.p: Licensed by the Texas Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending. Texas Residential Mortgage Loan Originator License.

nevada.title: Nevada
nevada.p: Licensed by the Nevada Division of Mortgage Lending. Nevada Mortgage Broker License.

florida.title: Florida
florida.p: Licensed by the Florida Office of Financial Regulation. Florida Mortgage Lender License.

colorado.title: Colorado
colorado.p: Licensed by the Colorado Division of Real Estate. Colorado Mortgage Loan Originator License.

licensing.additional_p: We may maintain licenses in additional states as required by law. Specific licensing information for each state can be verified through the NMLS Consumer Access website.
licensing.notice_p: We only conduct business in states where we are properly licensed. If you are located in a state where we are not licensed, we cannot provide mortgage lending services to you.

equalHousing.title: 4. Equal Housing Lender
equalHousing.p1: Broker Lenders is committed to ensuring that all qualified applicants receive equal treatment and access to credit, regardless of race, color, religion, sex, handicap, familial status, or national origin.
equalHousing.p2: We comply with the Fair Housing Act and all applicable fair lending laws. We do not discriminate in any aspect of a credit transaction on the basis of:

items.i6: Age (provided the applicant has the capacity to contract)
items.i9: Receipt of income from public assistance programs

equalHousing.pEnd: If you believe you have been discriminated against, you may file a complaint with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau or the Department of Housing and Urban Development.

regulatory.title: 5. Regulatory Compliance
regulatory.p1: Broker Lenders operates in compliance with all applicable federal and state laws and regulations, including:

agencies_items.i3: Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)

regulatory.pEnd: We regularly review and update our policies and procedures to ensure ongoing compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

fairLending.title: 6. Fair Lending Practices
fairLending.p1: Broker Lenders is committed to fair lending practices and ensuring that all applicants are treated fairly and consistently. Our fair lending program includes:

items.i1: Standardized underwriting criteria applied consistently to all applicants
items.i2: Regular training for all employees on fair lending laws and practices
items.i3: Monitoring and testing of lending practices for potential disparities

fairLending.pEnd: We evaluate loan applications based solely on creditworthiness and ability to repay, without regard to prohibited factors.

tila.title: 7. Truth in Lending Act (TILA)
tila.p1: Under the Truth in Lending Act, we are required to provide you with certain disclosures about your loan, including:

items.i1: Loan Estimate (LE) - provided within 3 business days of application
items.i2: Closing Disclosure (CD) - provided at least 3 business days before closing
items.i4: Finance charges and total amount financed
items.i5: Payment schedule and total of payments
items.i6: Right of rescission (for refinances of primary residences)

tila.pEnd: These disclosures help you understand the true cost of your loan and compare offers from different lenders.

respa.title: 8. Real Estate Settlement Procedures Act (RESPA)
respa.p1: RESPA requires us to provide you with information about the real estate settlement process and protects you from certain abusive practices. Under RESPA:

items.i1: We must provide you with a Loan Estimate within 3 business days of your application
items.i2: We must provide you with a Closing Disclosure at least 3 business days before closing
items.i3: We cannot require you to use specific service providers as a condition of your loan
items.i4: We cannot accept kickbacks or referral fees from service providers
items.i5: We must provide you with a servicing disclosure if we plan to sell or transfer your loan

respa.pEnd: RESPA also gives you the right to request information about your loan servicing and to file complaints about servicing problems.

cfpb.title: 9. Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB)
cfpb.p1: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) is a federal agency that regulates the offering and provision of consumer financial products and services.
cfpb.p2: You can file complaints with the CFPB about:
cfpb.pEnd: The CFPB also provides educational resources to help consumers make informed financial decisions.

notices.title: 10. Important Notices
notices.loanDisclaimer_p: This is not a commitment to lend. All loan applications are subject to credit approval, property appraisal, and verification of information. Rates, program terms, and conditions are subject to change without notice.
notices.rateAvailability_p: Interest rates and loan programs shown are subject to change without notice. Not all products are available in all states or for all loan amounts. Other restrictions and limitations may apply.
notices.verification_p: All information provided in loan applications is subject to verification. We may request additional documentation to verify income, assets, employment, and other information.
notices.property_p: All loans are subject to property appraisal and may require additional property inspections. Property must meet lender and investor guidelines for the specific loan program.
notices.questions_p: If you have any questions about these disclosures or our lending practices, please contact us:
notices.footer_effective: These disclosures are effective as of December 2024 and are subject to change as required by law.
notices.footer_copy: © 2024 Broker Lenders. All rights reserved. Pedro Lira NMLS #318973, Xpert Home Lending NMLS #2179191. Equal Housing Lender.
